Edit values, then update the corresponding React component to use these strings if you want this file to drive the UI.

faq.question: What are the exact dimensions?
faq.answer: Standard: 85 × 55 mm. Square: 65 × 65 mm. MiniCard: 70 × 28 mm.

faq.question: How thick is the paper?
faq.answer: Original Business Cards are printed on 350 gsm uncoated stock — substantial without being bulky.

faq.question: Can I print on both sides?
faq.answer: Yes. All Original Business Cards are printed full-colour on both sides at no extra cost.

faq.question: Will my colours print accurately?
faq.answer: We print in CMYK. Designs created in RGB will be auto-converted, which can shift bright tones slightly.

faq.question: What file format should I upload?
faq.answer: PDF (preferred), PNG, or JPG at 300 dpi or higher. Include a 2 mm bleed on every edge.

faq.question: How long does delivery take?
faq.answer: Standard: 3–5 working days. Next Day Delivery is available on selected products before 12pm.

faq.question: Can I order a sample first?
faq.answer: Yes — order a free Business Card Sample Pack to feel every paper stock before you buy.

faq.question: Do you offer Printfinity?
faq.answer: Yes. Print a different design on the back of every card in your pack at no extra cost.

faq.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
faq.answer: The PrintPandora Promise — if you're not 100% happy with your order, we'll reprint it or refund you.

faq.question: How do I order business cards?
faq.answer: Pick a paper, choose a size, then either use a template, upload artwork, or design from scratch in the browser. Add to cart and we ship within 3–5 working days.

faq.question: Which PrintPandora paper is best for my business?
faq.answer: Original is our most popular all-rounder. Super suits agencies that want a thicker hand-feel; Luxe and Cotton are for premium first impressions.

faq.question: How do I find a good design for my cards?
faq.answer: Browse 1000s of free templates in our design tool, or start from scratch with our preset layouts and brand colour picker.

faq.question: Which side should I print on?
faq.answer: Both. Front for your name, role, and primary contact details; back for your tagline, social handles, or QR code.

faq.question: Which file formats are best?
faq.answer: PDF (300 DPI, CMYK) gives the sharpest result. PNG and JPG at 300 DPI also work — just make sure colours are CMYK, not RGB.

faq.question: What is SF Express and other shipping options?
faq.answer: SF Express is our default carrier for fast worldwide delivery. DHL and USPS are available at checkout depending on destination.

about_page.title: About PrintPandora
about_page.description: PrintPandora is a print-on-demand studio helping small businesses and creators bring their brands to life on premium paper.
body_paragraphs: PrintPandora was founded with one belief: print is personal. From the weight of a business card to the texture of a postcard, the way your brand feels in someone's hands says as much about you as the design itself. We exist to make that experience effortless — beautifully designed, reliably produced, and shipped to your door.

sections.heading: Our story
sections.body: We started in a small studio with a single press and a stack of paper samples. A decade later we've grown into a print-on-demand platform that serves tens of thousands of independent businesses across the world, but our obsession with craft hasn't budged. Every order — one card or ten thousand — runs through the same quality checks.

sections.heading: What we believe
sections.body: Great print should not be a luxury, and it should never come at the expense of the planet. That's why we offer FSC® certified papers, soy-based inks, and a recyclable packaging programme on every order. When you choose PrintPandora, you're choosing print that's kinder by design.

list_items.text: If a card isn't right, it doesn't ship. Period.
Real humans answer your questions, every day of the week.
Certified papers and responsible logistics on every order.
New finishes, new stocks, new products — your feedback shapes everything we build.

sections.heading: Where we're going
sections.body: Our roadmap is built around the small businesses, designers, and creators who put their trust in us. Whether you're printing your very first business card or rebranding for the third time, we want PrintPandora to be the easiest, most rewarding part of the process.

about_page.closing_paragraph: Have an idea, a question, or a story to share? Get in touch — we'd love to hear from you.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.description: How PrintPandora collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy_page.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how PrintPandora ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, shares, and protects information about you when you visit our website or use our services. This is sample copy provided for layout purposes and should be replaced with a privacy policy tailored to your business and reviewed by your legal counsel before you go live.

sections.heading: 1. Information we collect
sections.body: We collect three broad categories of information:

list_items.text: Account details, billing and shipping addresses, artwork you upload, and any messages you send to our support team.
Usage data such as pages visited, device and browser type, IP address, and cookies that help us recognise you across visits.
Payment confirmation from our payment processors and shipping events from carriers.

sections.heading: 2. How we use your information
list_items: To process orders, fulfil them, and keep you updated on their progress.
To provide customer support and respond to your enquiries.
To improve our products, services, and the way our website works.
To send marketing communications where you've opted in. You can unsubscribe at any time using the link in any email.
To comply with legal obligations and protect against fraud or misuse.

sections.heading: 3. Sharing your information
sections.body: We share data only with parties who help us operate the business — payment processors, fulfilment partners, shipping carriers, and the analytics tools we use to understand how the site is performing. We never sell your personal information.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies
sections.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device. We use them to keep you signed in, remember items in your cart, and measure how visitors use the site. You can disable non-essential cookies at any time through your browser settings or our cookie preferences panel.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
sections.body: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete the personal information we hold about you, to object to certain processing, or to receive your data in a portable format. To exercise any of these rights, email privacy@printpandora.com.

sections.heading: 6. Data retention
sections.body: We keep personal information only as long as necessary to provide our services, comply with legal obligations, and resolve disputes. Order records are typically kept for seven years to satisfy tax and accounting requirements.

sections.heading: 7. Security
sections.body: We use industry-standard administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect your information. No system is perfect, however, and we encourage you to use a strong, unique password and to keep your account credentials confidential.

sections.heading: 8. Children's privacy
sections.body: Our services are not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from them. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, contact us and we'll delete it.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to this policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The most current version will always be posted on this page; we'll let you know about significant changes by email or through a notice on the site.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.body: Questions about this Privacy Policy? Email privacy@printpandora.com or visit our contact page.

terms_page.title: Terms & Conditions
terms_page.description: The terms and conditions governing your use of the PrintPandora website and the products and services we provide.
terms_page.intro: These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the PrintPandora website and the products and services we offer. By placing an order, creating an account, or otherwise using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. Please read them carefully — this is sample copy provided for layout purposes and should be replaced with terms reviewed by your legal counsel before you go live.

sections.heading: 1. About these terms
sections.body: PrintPandora ("we", "us", or "our") provides on-demand print services to customers worldwide. By using our services you confirm that you are at least 18 years old, or that you have the consent of a parent or legal guardian, and that you have the authority to enter into a binding contract.

sections.heading: 2. Your account
sections.body: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential and for all activity that takes place under your account. Notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized use. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.

sections.heading: 3. Orders and payment
sections.body: All orders are subject to acceptance and product availability. Prices shown on the site are inclusive of applicable taxes unless otherwise stated. Payment is taken at the point of order, and a confirmation email is sent once your order has been received. We reserve the right to cancel any order at our discretion, including for reasons of pricing errors or suspected fraud.

sections.heading: 4. Intellectual property and your artwork
sections.body: You retain ownership of any artwork or content you upload to PrintPandora. By uploading content, you confirm that you have the right to reproduce it and grant us a limited licence to print, fulfil, and ship your order. You agree not to upload content that infringes the rights of a third party or that is unlawful, defamatory, or obscene.

sections.heading: 5. Delivery
sections.body: Estimated delivery times are provided at checkout and are indicative only. We are not responsible for delays caused by carriers, customs, or events outside our reasonable control. Risk in the products passes to you on delivery.

sections.heading: 6. Returns and refunds
sections.body: Because each order is printed to your specification, products are generally non-returnable. If your order arrives damaged, defective, or materially different from what you ordered, contact us within 14 days of delivery and we'll arrange a reprint or refund.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of liability
sections.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, PrintPandora is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential losses arising from your use of our services. Our total liability for any claim relating to an order is limited to the amount you paid for that order.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to these terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. The most current version will always be posted on this page; substantial changes will be highlighted at the top of the page. Continued use of the service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: 9. Contact
sections.body: Questions about these Terms? Email legal@printpandora.com or visit our contact page.
